purpose_context: Today the HSME ecosystem is fragmented: agents access memory via MCP while operators rely on bash scripts (scripts/status.sh, justfile backup/restore/retry-failed) for diagnostics and maintenance, with no terminal interface for ad-hoc memory inspection or scripting. This mission unifies all those operations into a single typed Go binary backed by a shared bootstrap package, eliminating shell-script fragility, gaining portability and testability, and giving operators a single tool for both querying memory and managing the underlying database.
purpose_tldr: Unified hsme-cli binary that exposes MCP tools, status inspection, and admin operations from the terminal.
source_description: Promoted from ideas/cli-tool.md with expanded scope: bootstrap refactor, status migration from scripts/status.sh, and admin subcommands (retry-failed, backup, restore) migrated from the justfile.
